description: Structured implementation plan produced after analysis and before code modification steps.

affected_files.description: List of all files expected to be affected by the change.

approach.description: Detailed explanation of the technical approach that will be used to implement the solution.

notes.description: Additional notes that may help later steps such as coding or review.

risks.description: Potential risks associated with the planned implementation.

steps.description: Ordered list of implementation steps that will be executed.

description.description: Description of the step to be executed.

files.description: Files expected to be modified or created in this step.

summary.description: Short summary of the implementation strategy.

tests_strategy.description: Explanation of how the changes should be tested or validated.

title: Agent Plan Artifact
